tagline: Quality Not Quantity — The Best in Pool Maintenance and Repair

hero.headline: Your Pool Deserves Unhurried Excellence
hero.subheadline: Most pool techs rush through your yard to hit their quota. At Aquamarine, we pay for quality, not speed — so every visit is thorough, every chemical reading is precise, and your pool stays crystal clear all year long.
checkmarks: No rush jobs — technicians are paid for quality, never by pool count
Nearly 20 years serving Poway & San Diego County families
Owner Dave Arendt brings engineering-grade precision to every pool

services.headline: Complete Pool Care From a Team That Takes Their Time
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to complex equipment diagnostics, Aquamarine delivers meticulous service across Poway and greater San Diego County.

items.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
items.description: Thorough weekly cleaning and chemical balancing for residential and commercial pools. Our techs never rush — they stay until every detail is handled right.

items.title: Pool Equipment Repair
items.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and plumbing. Dave's engineering background means faster, smarter troubleshooting every time.

items.title: Equipment Installation
items.description: Professional installation and setup of pool equipment systems — from energy-efficient pumps to advanced filtration. Done right the first time, guaranteed.

items.title: Pool Inspections
items.description: Detailed pool inspections for real estate transactions. We assess equipment condition, structural integrity, and safety compliance so buyers and sellers have full confidence.

items.title: Commercial Pool Service
items.description: Keep your commercial facility safe, spotless, and compliant with health regulations. Reliable scheduling and meticulous chemical management for public-facing pools.

items.title: Chemical Balancing
items.description: Precision water chemistry from an owner with a chemical engineering background. Exact chlorine, pH, and alkalinity levels that keep your water safe and sparkling.

steps.title: Call or Request a Visit
steps.description: Reach out by phone or through our contact form. Dave or a team member will respond quickly to schedule your free pool assessment.

steps.title: We Inspect & Recommend
steps.description: A technician visits your property, evaluates your pool's condition and equipment, and provides honest recommendations — no upselling, just what your pool actually needs.

steps.title: Enjoy a Worry-Free Pool
steps.description: Sit back while our quality-first team keeps your pool clean, balanced, and running smoothly — week after week, season after season.

about.label: Locally Owned Since 2006
about.headline: Why Poway Families Trust Dave Arendt With Their Pools
about.description: After decades in the corporate world as an engineer, Dave Arendt founded Aquamarine Pool Service in 2006 with a simple conviction: pool care should never be about rushing through as many pools as possible. That is why Aquamarine never pays technicians by pool count — unlike most competitors. The result? Every visit is thorough, every chemical reading is precise, and every customer gets the attention they deserve. Nearly 20 years later, that quality-first philosophy has earned Aquamarine an A+ BBB rating and the loyalty of families across Poway, Rancho Bernardo, and greater San Diego County.

features.title: Owner-Operated & Accessible
features.description: Dave Arendt is hands-on and directly available for any questions, concerns, or special requests about your pool.

features.title: Engineering-Grade Expertise
features.description: With a background in corporate engineering and chemistry, Dave brings precision and scientific rigor to every pool we service.

features.title: Quality-First Guarantee
features.description: Not satisfied with a visit? Call Dave directly and we will come back to make it right at no additional charge.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different. We provide transparent quotes based on your pool's size, condition, and needs — never hidden fees, never corners cut.

guarantee.headline: Our Quality-First Promise
guarantee.description: If you are ever unsatisfied with a service visit, call Dave directly and we will come back to make it right at no additional charge. We built this business on doing the job right — not doing it fast. That commitment to quality is our guarantee to every customer.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in San Diego County?
faqs.answer: We serve Poway, Rancho Bernardo, Carmel Mountain Ranch, Rancho Penasquitos, 4S Ranch, Sabre Springs, Ramona, SD Country Estates, Highland Valley, Barona, Lakeside, and El Cajon.

faqs.question: What makes Aquamarine different from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: Our quality-not-quantity philosophy sets us apart. We never pay technicians by the number of pools they service — which is common in this industry. That means your tech takes their time, does the job right, and never rushes through your yard.

faqs.question: Do you offer pool inspections for home sales?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide thorough pool inspections for real estate transactions, covering equipment condition, structural assessment, and safety compliance. Contact us to schedule an inspection before your closing date.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to equipment problems?
faqs.answer: We prioritize repair calls and typically schedule service within 1-2 business days. For existing maintenance customers, we often respond even faster. Dave's engineering background means we diagnose problems accurately the first time.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Aquamarine Pool Service holds a California pool service contractor license and maintains full insurance. We are also an A+ rated business with the Better Business Bureau.

testimonials.name: Verified Nextdoor Neighbor
testimonials.text: Dave came out right away, found the problem with our pool equipment, and scheduled the follow-up work. Reliable, knowledgeable, and reasonable. Could not ask for better service.

testimonials.name: Yelp Reviewer
testimonials.text: I highly recommend Aquamarine Pool Service. Dave and his staff are very reliable and efficient. The biggest and best thing about Aquamarine is the customer service.

testimonials.name: Local Customer
testimonials.text: Dave is local and very accessible. He really takes care of his customers. You really can't do better than Aquamarine.

contact.headline: Let's Talk About Your Pool
contact.subtitle: Whether you need weekly maintenance, a repair, or just a second opinion — Dave and the Aquamarine team are ready to help.
benefits: Free pool assessment with honest recommendations
Direct access to owner Dave Arendt
Fast response for repairs and service calls

footer.description: Aquamarine Pool Service & Repair has served Poway and San Diego County since 2006. Our quality-not-quantity approach means your pool gets the thorough, expert care it deserves — every single visit.
footer.service_area: Proudly serving Poway, Rancho Bernardo, Carmel Mountain Ranch, Rancho Penasquitos, 4S Ranch, Sabre Springs, Ramona, and surrounding San Diego County communities.
